# Siddhartha Chaturvedi — sidc.ai

## Who
Siddhartha Chaturvedi builds AI systems that ship outcomes, not drafts. Former Microsoft Director of Product Management (2016–2025), INSEAD MBA. Won Fast Company's World Changing Ideas Award (2021).

## What He Built
- Microsoft Premonition: edge AI robot that traps mosquitoes and runs genomic analysis to detect emerging diseases
- AI for Health: $60M global program spanning 200+ grantees tackling child mortality, infectious disease, and health equity
- 300+ GenAI use cases for US Federal civilian agencies, from pathogen surveillance to production systems

## Current Focus
Mapping how AI stops being a chatbot you babysit and starts being a system that ships outcomes — across tools, teams, context, verification, and the trust gap between generation and action.

## Value Function Framework
A framework for evaluating useful AI across three dimensions:
- Resonance (Voice): aligns outputs to organizational voice so they feel native, not generic
- Relevance (Evidence): grounds responses in verified and proprietary sources to reduce hallucination
- Response (Execution): turns intelligence into deterministic next steps inside the user's workflow
The equilibrium of all three produces AI that ships.

## Theses
1. The future of AI is not generation. It is coordination. Value shifts from making content to closing loops across people, systems, and decisions.
2. The future of health AI is not prediction. It is evidence. Breakthroughs will come from turning fragmented data into validated, decision-ready action.
3. The future of software is not human-first or agent-first. It is dual-intent. The winning products will serve humans and agents through shared context, executable workflows, and persistent memory.

## Ventures
- VeriScience.AI (https://veriscience.ai) — evidence-grade AI for women's health
- Unfreeze.org (https://unfreeze.org) — career transition intelligence
- Stratified Advisory (https://stratcorp.ai) — board-as-a-service for the GenAI era
- JustAI.fyi (https://justai.fyi) — full Software 3.0 paper

## Field Notes
- "The Enterprise Refactor" (https://sidc.ai/essays/justai/) — a local field note translating Software 3.0 into context, verification, dual interfaces, and the agent web; links to the full paper at https://justai.fyi
- "The Value Function" (https://sidc.ai/essays/value-function/): a working model + printable worksheet for AI that balances voice, evidence, and execution
- "The App That Builds Itself for One Question" (https://sidc.ai/essays/interface-triage/): what generative UI means \u2014 the model builds a bespoke interface for the question instead of a wall of text \u2014 with an interactive demo
- "AI Won't Simplify Work. It Might Finally Restore It." (https://sidc.ai/essays/fow/) — the real promise of the agentic era isn't speed, it's returning human attention to the complexity that matters

## Agentic Capabilities (WebMCP)
This site implements the emerging, evolving W3C Web Model Context Protocol (WebMCP) standard to allow AI agents to interact with our strategic frameworks directly.
- **Static Discovery Manifest**: Exposed at `https://sidc.ai/.well-known/webmcp` and `https://sidc.ai/.well-known/webmcp.json`.
- **Dynamic JavaScript WebMCP API**: Loaded dynamically on the client via `https://sidc.ai/js/webmcp.js`.
- **Exposed Tools**:
  - `fetch_professional_profile` — returns Siddhartha's credentials, board advisory roles, and case metrics.
  - `fetch_field_note_summaries` — indexes all active Field Notes with URLs and TL;DR definitions.
  - `triage_workload_interface` — runs the 3x3 workload triage assessment (GUI, Agent, GenUI).
  - `evaluate_system_equilibrium` — runs the Value Function safety/risk checker.
